'''√l-k-h''' ('''lakaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cunnilinguate|cunnilinguate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-k-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cunnilinguate|cunnilinguate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √l-k-h
|-
! Lemma
| lakaha
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || lakahithi || lakahiji || lakahishi || lakahi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || lakahuthuth || lakahujuj || lakahushush || lakah
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || lakahuthu || lakahuju || lakahushu || lakahu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || lakahufuth || lakahufuj || lakahufush || lakahuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || lakahethe || lakaheje || lakaheshe || lakahe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || lakahothoth || lakahojoj || lakahoshosh || lakah
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || lakahotho || lakahojo || lakahosho || lakaho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || lakahofoth || lakahofoj || lakahofosh || lakahof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || lakahïf || lakahïf || lakahïf || lakahïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || lakahïfïf || lakahïfïf || lakahïfïf || lakahïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || lakahïf || lakahïf || lakahïf || lakahïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || lakahïf || lakahïf || lakahïf || lakahïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || lakahæthæ || lakahæjæ || lakahæshæ || lakahæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || lakahathath || lakahajaj || lakahashash || lakah
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || lakahatha || lakahaja || lakahasha || lakaha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || lakahafath || lakahafaj || lakahafash || lakahaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || lakahasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || golakahasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokilakahasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || lakahnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || golakahnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokilakahnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || lakahshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || golakahnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokilakahshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || lakahroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || golakahnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokilakahroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || lakahmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || golakahnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokilakahmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || lakahsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || golakahnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokilakahsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || lakahngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || golakahnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokilakahngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || lakahyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || golakahnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokilakahyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || lakahyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || golakahnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokilakahyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || lakahnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || golakahnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokilakahnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || lakahnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || golakahnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokilakahnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || lakahnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || golakahnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokilakahnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || lakahshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || golakahnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokilakahshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || lakahshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || golakahnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokilakahshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || lakahshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || golakahnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokilakahshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || lakahronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || golakahnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokilakahronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || lakahroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || golakahnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokilakahroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || lakahromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || golakahnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokilakahromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || lakahmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || golakahnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokilakahmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || lakahmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || golakahnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokilakahmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || lakahmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || golakahnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokilakahmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || lakah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || lækæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || holakah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || holækæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hoholakah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hoholækæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nülakah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nülækæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünülakah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünülækæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïlakah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïlækæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïlakah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïlækæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lulakah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || lulækæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lululakah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lululækæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lilakah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lilækæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lililakah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lililækæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kolakah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kolækæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokolakah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokolækæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kelakah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kelækæh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekelakah
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekelækæh
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
